## Testing

Commands run:

- [ ] `dotnet restore`
- [ ] `dotnet build`
- [ ] `dotnet test`
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes`

If Python changed:

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m mypy .`

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is small and reviewable.
- [ ] No direct commits to `main`.
- [ ] No secrets committed.
- [ ] No arbitrary shell execution added.
- [ ] Path handling is validated.
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed.
